6.   W.E.F. 1st February 2021, applicable NAV for allotment of units shall be based on time of receipt of transaction and funds available for utilization up
to the cut-off time.
7.   PAN and KYC are mandatory for all transactions in Mutual Funds.
8.   All redemption / IDCW cheque(s) and other communication/s will be addressed to the first holder.
9.   Nominee Registration or Opt-out of Nomination is mandatory for individual investors.
10.   Linking of Aadhaar & PAN is mandatory for individual investors.
11.   Exit load on purchase/switch-in units shall be at the rates prevailing on allotment date. Exit load for systematic transactions shall be at the rates
prevailing on registration date. For further details please refer our Scheme Information Document (SID) and Addendums available on our website
www.sbimf.com which are issued from time to time.
12.   W.E.F. 1st July 2020, Stamp Duty @ 0.005% is applicable on allotment of units.
13.   TDS shall be deducted (wherever applicable) as per rates under New Tax Regime. Differential tax if any, should be evaluated by investor(s), basis
relevant tax provisions.
14.   For Taxation related queries, please consult your Tax Advisor.

Memorandum (KIM).
